pr.title: Add MaxParams6L_120 submission (1.2374 BPB) to track_non_record_16mb

output.summary: Six-layer encoder-decoder with learned skips, SwiGLU, untied embeddings/high LR, full MHA, and INT8 weight-decay tuned quantization.
techniques: Six-layer encoder-decoder with learned skip connections and full MHA
SwiGLU MLP plus untied embeddings with high embed LR and per-dimension scaling
INT8+zlib compression combined with weight decay to tighten quantization
